subject: Add missing shared-cache-mode property
commit_message:
Add missing shared-cache-mode property

feature-state-management consistently fails merge job, and
inconsistently fails the verify job.

It is unable to create the JPA tables-specifically FORWARDPROGRESSENTITY.

In policy/common, the integrity-audit code that defines and tests this
table has the following cache property defined in the persistence.xml

Issue-ID: POLICY-2381
Change-Id: Ibe21ff2f6b1d0038bfc654272a8def8e5b0ab27e
Signed-off-by: Pamela Dragosh <pdragosh@research.att.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/policy-drools-pdp-master-verify-java/1103/ : FAILURE

Unable to build due to a non-resolvable parent POM. Search logs for "[FATAL] Non-resolvable parent POM" to find the logs.

The fix for this is usually to make sure your poms are pointing to parents that exist. Double check:

 * groupId is correct and no typos
 * artifactId is correct and no typos
 * version is correct for branch ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/policy-drools-pdp-master-verify-java/1103/ )

There are test failures. Please look in the log to identify them. ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/policy-drools-pdp-master-verify-java/1103/ )

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/policy-drools-pdp-master-verify-java/1103
